(xxxv) If the Moon along with Jupiter and Venus be in

(xxxvi) If Mars be in Capricorn-Ascendant and the Moon
in Cancer; or if Mars, the Sun and Jupiter occupy in order
Capricorn, Aries and Aquarius.
(xxxvii) If the full Moon conjoined with any planet other
than the lord of the Lagna be aspected by Venus. Mercury and
